About us

Every corner, every cut line, checked twice

Precision Touch Painting was born from a simple idea, and it's the same one I've always worked by: I'm methodical, detail-obsessed, and never satisfied until it's better than the last job. The difference between a good paint job and a great one lives in the details no one will point out to you — the clean line beside a window, the even hand on a wall under raking light, the care taken to protect every surface before a single tin gets opened.

I work across Gisborne and the surrounding area, on residential and commercial projects, giving every job the same level of care — no job too small, no corner cut.

100%Focus on detail
1:1You deal with me, start to finish
Gis.Service area
Matte finish — precision cut line on frame and ceiling
Services

Painting for every surface of your property

From a single room to a full house exterior. We prep, protect, and paint to the same standard on every job — no job too small.

01 Interior Walls, ceilings, and trim. Fine cut lines along mouldings, windows, and doors. MATTE / SATIN
02 Exterior Weatherboard cladding, eaves, and facades, with proper preparation and priming for Gisborne's climate. WEATHER-RESISTANT
03 Decks and fences Treatment and painting of exterior timber, railings, and outdoor structures. TIMBER / METAL
04 Repaints Renewal of previously painted spaces: repairing imperfections before every coat. PREP INCLUDED
05 Bathrooms and kitchens High moisture-resistant paints, with neat finishes around fixtures and cabinetry. MOISTURE-RESISTANT
06 House Washing High-pressure water blasting paired with a liquid fungicidal treatment that lifts mould, moss, and lichen for a deeper clean, leaving surfaces ready for paint. WATER BLASTING
